'''''Star Wars: Empire: A Little Piece of Home''''' was a 2-issue story arc of ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]'' published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. It ran from May 26, [[2004]] to June 30, 2004.

==Plot summary==
Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] has been visiting planets to find allies in the fight against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. One visit takes her to the [[Panteer estate]], home of two brothers from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. She is welcomed warmly by [[Raal Panteer]]. The two plan a trek into the jungle. Raal saves Leia's life but in turn loses his when he was bitten by a [[morp]]. The other brother [[Heeth Panteer]] finds them the next morning and grieving over his brother's body, tells Leia to leave and never come back.
